_meta: Scene blueprint — read by animation_engine.py and frame_generator.py

dialogue.line: Alright... but what's the catch? There's always a catch.

frame.MrWilly_pose: standing right of frame, leaning forward, one hand on chin, eyes narrowed suspiciously
frame.MrWilly_expression: suspicious, probing, slightly amused — knows there has to be a catch
frame.Xpel_pose: standing on table left of frame, both arms slightly raised in mild nervousness, slight shrink
frame.Xpel_expression: caught, nervous smile, eyes dart slightly

camera_motion.movement: slow deliberate push in toward MrWilly — building tension
camera_motion.end: tighter medium on MrWilly with Xpel visible on edge of frame

character_motion.MrWilly: leans forward gradually, hand moves to chin, eyes narrow, one eyebrow rises, single slow blink
character_motion.Xpel: arms rise slightly in nervous surrender position, body shrinks down a tiny bit — no spinning, no particles
